error.signature: S3 list_objects returns only 1000 keys even though bucket has more objects

verdict.summary: S3 ListObjectsV2 returns max 1000 keys per call by default. The 'IsTruncated' flag and 'NextContinuationToken' must be checked. Many tutorials omit the pagination loop, leading to silently incomplete results.

dead_ends.action: Call list_objects_v2 once and use all returned keys
dead_ends.why_fails: Default MaxKeys is 1000. If bucket has more objects, you silently miss everything beyond the first 1000.

dead_ends.action: Set MaxKeys to a very large number
dead_ends.why_fails: MaxKeys cannot exceed 1000 per S3 API spec. Setting it higher is silently capped to 1000.

workarounds.action: Use paginator to automatically handle continuation tokens
workarounds.how: paginator = s3.get_paginator('list_objects_v2'); for page in paginator.paginate(Bucket='my-bucket'): ...

workarounds.action: Manually loop with ContinuationToken until IsTruncated is False
workarounds.how: while True: resp = s3.list_objects_v2(Bucket=b, ContinuationToken=token); if not resp['IsTruncated']: break
